user.title: MXZ Coordinator
user.description: Pick every indoor head on this MXZ outdoor unit (2–8). ORDER IS PRIORITY: the first head wins a heat-vs-cool standoff. Vane controls are detected automatically; comfort thresholds, weather-based changeover, and fan boost are set afterward via the integration's Configure button. For a second outdoor unit, add the integration again.

data.heads: Indoor heads (climate entities, in priority order)

data_description.notify_service: Who to notify when a head is knocked off its coordinated mode and the coordinator puts it back — e.g. notify.mobile_app_phone.

sensors.title: Room temperature sensors
sensors.description:
Pick the room temperature sensor for each head, in order:

{heads}

error.duplicate_heads: The same head was selected more than once.
error.need_two_heads: Select at least two heads (a single head doesn't need a coordinator).
error.too_many_heads: A single MXZ outdoor unit supports at most 8 heads.

abort.already_configured: This pair of heads is already configured.

abort.empty_options: No settings were submitted; the existing configuration was kept.

init.title: MXZ Coordinator tuning
init.description: All temperatures are in your Home Assistant unit (°C or °F); the defaults adapt to it.

data.demand_threshold: Demand threshold S (° off-target before the shared mode may flip)
data.engage_deadband: Engage deadband D (° off-target before a head actively runs)
data.mode_hysteresis: Mode hysteresis (seconds minimum dwell before a heat↔cool flip)
data.resting_mode_bias: Resting mode when no room is calling
data.heat_lockout_floor: Heat-lockout safety floor (° — heat below this even when locked out)
data.cool_lockout_ceiling: Cool-lockout safety ceiling (° — cool above this even when locked out)
data.changeover_entity: Seasonal changeover weather/temperature entity (optional — auto-drives the lockouts from local weather)
data.fan_boost_enable: Fan boost: drive fan speed by how far the room is from target
data.primary_vane_vertical: Primary vertical vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.primary_vane_horizontal: Primary horizontal vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.secondary_vane_vertical: Secondary vertical vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.secondary_vane_horizontal: Secondary horizontal vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.zone_3_vane_vertical: Zone 3 vertical vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.zone_3_vane_horizontal: Zone 3 horizontal vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.zone_4_vane_vertical: Zone 4 vertical vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.zone_4_vane_horizontal: Zone 4 horizontal vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.zone_5_vane_vertical: Zone 5 vertical vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.zone_5_vane_horizontal: Zone 5 horizontal vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.zone_6_vane_vertical: Zone 6 vertical vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.zone_6_vane_horizontal: Zone 6 horizontal vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.zone_7_vane_vertical: Zone 7 vertical vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.zone_7_vane_horizontal: Zone 7 horizontal vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.zone_8_vane_vertical: Zone 8 vertical vane (auto-detected; override if needed)
data.zone_8_vane_horizontal: Zone 8 horizontal vane (auto-detected; override if needed)

recompute.name: Recompute
recompute.description: Force the coordinator to recompute the plan and re-apply it to the heads now.
